# AI BuildOps Reference Pack

## Summary
Instantiates the platform for AI product teams, covering intake, spec quality, implementation flow, eval gating, release, and incident learning.

## Extracted Preview
> Ruh.ai V1 Reference Pack Definition AI BuildOps Pack
> Governed digital employees for intake, specification, implementation planning, build orchestration, evaluation, release, and post-release learning
> This document defines the first horizontal reference pack for companies that build AI products. It instantiates the platform PRD and pack specification as a reusable operating pack that turns software delivery into a governed conveyor of digital employees instead of a chain of manual handoffs.
> What this pack must accomplish
> Normalize messy inbound product, support, and incident signals into clean work items.
> Generate better specifications and plans before work is assigned to coding agents or engineers.
> Use digital employees to orchestrate build, eval, review, release, and post-release learning without removing human control from architecture or production.
> Stay horizontal across AI product companies by focusing on common SDLC workflows rather than one team's exact stack.
> Document facts
> Pack ID: ref.ai.buildops
> Reference version: 1.0.0
> Pack type: Function reference pack
> Primary deployment model: One tenant trust boundary; one workspace per product or repo cluster
> Conforms to: Ruh.ai V1 Employee Pack Specification
> 
> Outcome area
> Problems removed
> Primary workflows
> Business measures
> Work intake
> Requests arrive through support threads, Slack, incidents, and product notes with poor deduplication or prioritization.
> Signal intake and triage
> Backlog hygiene, time-to-owner
> Specification quality
> Teams start coding from partial requirements and missing acceptance criteria.
> Spec and plann...
